title: Context-scoped schemas — no Accounts import in Billing
prompt: Design Billing.Invoice and Billing.Subscription in a way that neither imports or references MyApp.Accounts.User directly. Both need a user_id (integer field), and both have independent changeset/2 functions. Explain in a module doc why no belongs_to :user is used. Write to lib/my_app/billing/invoice.ex and lib/my_app/billing/subscription.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires architectural discipline across two files. Sonnet often reaches for belongs_to by habit.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes plugin: 'Context isn't just a namespace — it changes what words mean.'
